{{CargoRelic
|name=Schmidt Camera
|class_id=22598
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-31
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On May 31, 1930 AD, German optician Bernhard Schmidt invented a new type of camera to observe the sky.<br>The Schmidt camera is an optical camera used to photograph the sky. Unlike regular cameras, its lens is a spherical mirror that can capture a wide-angle view of the sky without distortion. The invention of the Schmidt camera was a groundbreaking achievement that changed astronomy and optics in the twentieth century.
|fame=42
|art=36
|fth=46
|civ=45
|tech=74
|ss1=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +30<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
|ss2=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +40<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +4<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
|ss3=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +50<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +5<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
|ss4=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +70<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +7<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
|ss5=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +90<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +9<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
|ss7=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail HP +90<br>Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +9<br>Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50<br>Snail HP +700 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quantumamp  skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Quantum Amp: Quantum Amp Max Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Quantumamp  skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Quantum Amp: Quantum Amp production +7.5%
}}
